_schema.description: Golden fixtures: hand-verified strategy analytics for regression. Architect Phase 7 expects every PAYOFF/PROB closed-form invariant to also have at least one golden case here. Values verified independently (by hand or QuantLib/py_vollib) BEFORE the implementation existed — never copied from implementation output.
_schema.verification_field: verified_by must name the independent source: 'hand', 'quantlib', 'py_vollib'
